M-047.NAME: mtproto-admin-ops
M-047.owns: Admin inspection and controlled operations for MTProto assignments, runtime bridge health, reissue, revoke, and audit-safe diagnostics.
M-047.purpose: Give the operator visibility and controlled recovery actions for user MTProto proxy assignments without exposing secrets broadly.

exports.api-admin-list-mtproto: List assignments by user, SNI, status, and timestamps with redacted sensitive fields.
exports.api-admin-reissue-mtproto: Force explicit reissue after secret rotation or runtime repair.
exports.api-admin-revoke-mtproto: Disable one user's MTProto assignment without disabling VPN account access.
exports.view-admin-mtproto: Admin UI surface for health, assignment search, reissue, revoke, and recent failures.

admin-policy.policy-1: Admin list views show redacted or derived-safe assignment fields by default.
admin-policy.policy-2: Reissue and revoke are explicit audited actions with confirmation in the frontend.
admin-policy.policy-3: MTProto revoke does not implicitly cancel KrotPN subscription or VPN device access.

constraints.constraint-1: Audit events must not store full tg://proxy links, verification tokens, or raw secrets.
constraints.constraint-2: Admin mobile UX must preserve confirmation-safe destructive actions.

M-047.hotspot: H-033: Admin MTProto operations must never expose full secrets or proxy links in logs, tables, or audit payloads
